# MRC GlobalPay — llms.txt

> MRC GlobalPay is an instant crypto-to-crypto swap platform supporting 500+ digital assets with zero-delay settlement and no registration required.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage / Instant Swap Widget](https://mrcglobalpay.com/): Real-time exchange widget with live rates for 500+ cryptocurrencies. Avg settlement: under 60 seconds.
- [Swap Pairs Q&A](https://mrcglobalpay.com/#swap-pairs): Detailed Q&A for popular swap pairs including BTC/USDT, ETH/SOL, XRP/ETH, DOGE/BTC and more.
- [How It Works](https://mrcglobalpay.com/#how-it-works): Four-step swap process — pick pair, enter wallet, send funds, receive in seconds.
- [Features](https://mrcglobalpay.com/#features): Sub-60s settlement, zero hidden fees, no KYC, 500+ assets, 24/7 uptime, global access.
- [FAQ](https://mrcglobalpay.com/#faq): Frequently asked questions about security, fees, processing times, and supported cryptocurrencies.
- [Popular Trading Pairs](https://mrcglobalpay.com/#popular-pairs): Most traded crypto pairs with instant settlement.

## Core Facts

- Average swap settlement time: under 60 seconds
- Supported cryptocurrencies: 500+
- Registration required: No
- KYC required: No
- Hidden fees: None
- Availability: 24/7/365, worldwide
- Liquidity: Aggregated from multiple top-tier providers for best market rates
